utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. The final property solution includes all six of these items. Each one is fully specified with all details expected: (1) property includes selected property with address, type, price, features, and even an alternate property; (2) financing includes lender, pre-approval amount, rate, term, amortization, monthly payment, down payment, and conditions; (3) legal_services includes provider, list of services, and estimated cost; (4) moving_services includes provider, list of services, and estimated cost; (5) setup_services includes providers, detailed service breakdown, and total estimated cost; (6) total_budget includes detailed cost breakdown and totals. Therefore, all 6 items are fully covered.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final property solution shows two purchase properties: '145 Carlaw Avenue, Leslieville, Toronto, ON' (a townhouse) and '88 Front Street East, Corktown, Toronto, ON' (a condo). These do not appear by name in the ground-truth ratings, so we must match them by type, price, and features. The first property is a townhouse priced at CAD $835K, which fits into the 'purchase_properties' group near the upper end of Marcus Chen’s CAD $700–850K budget. Among the available ground-truth options, the 'Historic Townhouse' at CAD $750K is the only townhouse and closest in profile—spacious property with workshop and garden space but stretching the budget—so this corresponds to the selected_property. The second property, a condo at CAD $780K, aligns with modern design, downtown lifestyle, and high-speed internet, matching the 'Modern Apartment' profile (CAD $520K, modern, tech-focused, within budget). Even though the price differs, it is the most conceptually similar condo-type listing. Therefore, we map '145 Carlaw Avenue, Leslieville, Toronto, ON' → 'Historic Townhouse' (rating 6) and '88 Front Street East, Corktown, Toronto, ON' → 'Modern Apartment' (rating 9).
